description: A plain, undesigned color photograph (no on-image text or graphic overlays) of a skilled tradesperson at work. A man in dark navy coveralls with yellow/lime reflective hi-vis stripes, heavy welding gloves, and a camouflage-patterned welding helmet/mask leans over a steel work table cutting metal with an oxy-fuel cutting torch; a bright shower of orange sparks sprays downward from the cut. The setting is a metal fabrication shop with a cinder-block wall, hand tools, gears, and equipment hanging in the softly lit background. The image is documentary/editorial in style and was used to celebrate the skilled trades (tweet: 'The skilled trades go so hard'). Because it carries no designed text, slogans, or agency seals on the image itself, it is marked not designed; it functions as an evocative stock-style photo rather than a meme/poster.
